name: Double Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar in a bowl until well blended.
2. Add egg and vanilla, mixing until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, mix cocoa with buttermilk or water until smooth.
4. Combine the cocoa mixture with the creamed butter mixture.
5. Stir in flour, baking soda, and salt until just mixed.
6. Fold in chocolate chips.
7. Drop dough by teaspoonfuls onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes or until centers are almost set.
9. Remove cookies from the sheet while still hot.
Makes 48 cookies.
